headline: Amazon develops a warehouse robot workers can speak to
summary: Amazon unveils Proteus, an AI-powered warehouse robot. New Proteus interacts with human workers using natural language. This upgrade supports Amazon's shift towards increased automation.

headline: Shokz upgraded its open earbuds with better sound and a lighter design
summary: Shokz introduces OpenDots 2 and OpenDots Air earbuds. New models feature improved sound quality and a lighter design. These open earbuds clip to the ear, projecting sound without blocking canals.

headline: Nintendo confirms it will sell a new Switch 2 with replaceable battery in the EU
summary: Nintendo plans to release Switch 2 models with user-replaceable batteries in the EU. This change complies with a new EU regulation taking effect in 2027. The move aims to meet environmental and consumer rights obligations.

headline: Apple is bringing age verification to Texas this week
summary: Apple will implement age verification for Texas App Store users starting Thursday. This follows a federal court allowing Texas's App Store Accountability Act to proceed. New users creating accounts will be subject to the age verification process.

headline: XCOM-Like Star Wars Zero Company Release Date Leaks — and It's Coming Sooner Than You Might Think
summary: Release date for "Star Wars Zero Company" has reportedly leaked. The turn-based strategy game is expected much sooner than anticipated. It offers an "XCOM-like" gameplay experience in the Star Wars universe.

headline: Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game Delayed by 3 Weeks
summary: "Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game" launch is delayed by three weeks. Developers are adding new content not originally planned for release. The extra time ensures a more complete game experience.

headline: The Mound: Omen of Cthulhu Brings Insanity Effects to its Lovecraftian Multiplayer Horror | IGN Preview
summary: "The Mound: Omen of Cthulhu" is a cooperative, Lovecraftian horror game. Features unique insanity effects, challenging players' perception of reality. Set in a pirate era, players must fight to maintain sanity and discover secrets.

headline: LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight Gets Nintendo Switch 2 Release Date
summary: "LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight" now has a confirmed release date. The game is set to launch on the upcoming Nintendo Switch 2 console. Fans can anticipate the new LEGO Batman adventure on the next-gen platform.

headline: Avoid 'reactive' police reforms after Nowak murder, senior black officer warns
summary: Senior black police officer warns against "reactive" reforms following the Nowak murder. Head of National Black Police Association criticizes proposed racism guidance changes. The changes are deemed "not well thought-out" and potentially ineffective.

headline: New NHS drug offers ovarian cancer patients more time and better quality of life
summary: A new NHS drug provides ovarian cancer patients with extended life. Patients report a significantly improved quality of life with fewer side effects. The medication is described as "kinder on the body," giving patients hope.

headline: Israel and Lebanon agree to implement ceasefire if Hezbollah stops attacks
summary: Israel and Lebanon agree to a ceasefire condition, pending Hezbollah's cessation of attacks. The US states both countries reject efforts to hold Lebanon's future "hostage." The agreement seeks to de-escalate tensions in the region.

headline: NHS staff should be banned from wearing pro-Palestinian badges, report recommends
summary: A new report recommends banning pro-Palestinian badges for NHS staff. The recommendation comes from Lord Mann's review of antisemitism within the NHS. This is one of several proposals aimed at addressing organizational issues.
